user.title: LED Controller
user.description: Pick the device type to register.

device.title: Select device
device.description: Choose the physical device this entry will control. For VZM35-SN (Zigbee2MQTT) also provide the Z2M friendly name.

error.wrong_integration: Selected device is not owned by the expected integration for this type.

set_led.name: Set LED
set_led.description: Set one or more LEDs on a registered device.

led.name: LED
led.description: LED index (1-based), list of indices, or 'all'.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: ZEN32-specific behavior mode. Ignored on Inovelli.

transition.name: Transition
transition.description: Seconds for Inovelli fade. Ignored on ZEN32.

clear_led.name: Clear LED
clear_led.description: Turn off one or more LEDs on a registered device.

led.name: LED
led.description: LED index (1-based), list of indices, or 'all'.

set_scene.name: Set scene
set_scene.description: Atomic multi-LED update on a registered device.

leds.name: LEDs
leds.description: List of {led, color, brightness, mode} entries.
